title: Baby Bath White Plastic from Newborn First Steps
description: Product Description First Steps Baby Plastic Bath Tub, Pink/White/Blue - This product is manufactured by RSW International Ltd. Our brand ‘First Steps’ is the natural choice for affordable, quality products for an important start in life. With a collection that offers all the essentials to mothers and babies alike with a varied selection of feeding, soothers, bath time and travel products. Products are safety tested ensuring compliance with EU standards and Legislations. All First Steps products are BPA, PVC and phthalate free.First Steps Pack of 3 Medium flow silicone teats - This product is manufactured by RSW International Ltd. Our brand ‘First Steps’ is the natural choice for affordable, quality products for an important start in life. With a collection that offers all the essentials to mothers and babies alike with a varied selection of feeding, soothers, bath time and travel products. Products are safety tested ensuring compliance with EU standards and Legislations. All First Steps products are BPA, PVC and phthalate free. Safety Warning Never leave your child unattended whilst in the bath, even for the shortest of time. Always add cold water first, then add warm water to obtain a suitable bath temperature. always check the water temperature before placing baby in the bath. Box Contains 1 x First Steps Baby Plastic Bath Tub, Pink/White/Blue See more
